plan.failureSummary: The test failed because the chatbot requires an OpenAI API key or a Pro subscription to generate responses and proceed with evaluation. The agent successfully navigated to the Advanced settings modal, confirming that an OpenAI API Key or a Pro subscription upgrade is required. Without providing an API key via environment variables, test fixtures, or instructions, the compliance evaluation is impossible.
observedIndicators: page.ai failed due to missing credentials/API key
agent correctly determined the objective was not completable due to application constraints

remediationSteps.summary: Supply a valid OpenAI API key to the test environment
remediationSteps.details: Provide a valid OpenAI API key as an environment variable or test fixture in the test file so that the agent can retrieve and input it during execution.

remediationSteps.summary: Update page.ai instructions to configure the API key first
remediationSteps.details: Update the test file and page.ai instructions to explicitly pass the OpenAI API key (from process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY) and guide the agent to first enter the key in the Settings panel before attempting to evaluate the chatbot.

plan.notes: The agent correctly marked the objective as not completable because the chatbot refuses to process messages without an API key or an upgraded plan. To resolve this, we must inject a valid OpenAI API key into the test so the agent can configure it in the application's settings before running the evaluation.
